evals.prompt: Check if the container is running.
evals.expected_output: An object reporting container liveliness; if not running, an error indicating start() should be called.
assertions: container_ping is called with no parameters
Response is interpreted to decide whether container_initialize must be called next

evals.expected_output: Container is started; subsequent container_exec calls succeed.
assertions: container_initialize is called when container_ping reports not running
container_initialize is treated as idempotent (safe to call when unsure)

evals.expected_output: stdout, stderr, and exit code returned.
assertions: container_exec is called with the exact command string
Returned object exposes stdout, stderr, and exit code
